$comment: Generated by Phase 1.5 (TODO-02). Catalog of RFC-7807 error codes referenced by openapi.yaml (Problem.code). type URIs are rooted at the problems base.

errors.when: Request body is not valid JSON, or a required structural element is missing/unparseable.

errors.message: API key or bearer token is missing or invalid.
errors.when: No credentials, expired/invalid JWT, or unknown/revoked API key.

errors.message: The caller is not permitted to access this resource.
errors.when: Authenticated caller attempts cross-tenant access to a document they do not own (IDOR guard, HLD section 8).

errors.message: No document with the given id exists.
errors.when: document_id does not exist, was never ingested, or has been erased (DPDP delete).

errors.message: One or more fields failed validation.
errors.when: Body parses but violates schema constraints (e.g. confidence_threshold out of [0,1], max_sections out of range, both/neither of document_id|document_ids).

errors.message: The uploaded PDF exceeds the maximum allowed size.
errors.when: Upload exceeds the per-request size/page cap (DoS mitigation, HLD section 8 STRIDE-D).
Uploaded file is not a PDF or content-type is not multipart/form-data with a PDF part.

errors.message: The rate limit for this credential has been exceeded.
errors.when: Per-key/per-JWT-subject quota or burst limit exceeded (see x-rate-limit). Retry-After header provided.

errors.message: An unexpected error occurred. The incident has been logged.
errors.when: Unhandled server fault. Internal details are never exposed to the caller (logged with query_id correlation).
Vector DB, Postgres, or an LLM provider is down/unreachable; routing may degrade to fallback (NFR-013). Retry-After header provided.
